name: Cinnamon Coffee Cake (Sour Cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat butter and 2 cups sugar until fluffy.
2. Add vanilla. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and sour cream to the butter mixture, beating enough after each addition to keep the batter smooth.
5. Pour 1/3 of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
6. Sprinkle remaining sugar, cinnamon, and chopped walnuts over the batter.
7. Repeat layers two more times.
8. Bake at 350°F for 70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before removing from the pan to cool completely.
